sourcesContent:
// Simulated chat messages for the iShowSpeed Ethiopia stream demo
// Each message has an original language version and an English translation

const messages = [
    {
        id: 1,
        username: 'abebe_eth',
        avatar: '🇪🇹',
        original: 'ስፒድ ኢትዮጵያን እንኳን ደህና መጣህ! 🔥',
        translated: 'Speed welcome to Ethiopia! 🔥',
        lang: 'am',
        langLabel: 'Amharic',
        timestamp: '0:42',
    },
    {
        id: 2,
        username: 'speed_fan_br',
        avatar: '🇧🇷',
        original: 'KKKKKK ele tá maluco demais',
        translated: 'HAHAHA he is way too crazy',
        lang: 'pt',
        langLabel: 'Portuguese',
        timestamp: '0:43',
    },
    {
        id: 3,
        username: 'tokyo_viewer',
        avatar: '🇯🇵',
        original: 'スピードはマジでやばいwww',
        translated: 'Speed is seriously insane lol',
        lang: 'ja',
        langLabel: 'Japanese',
        timestamp: '0:44',
    },
    {
        id: 4,
        username: 'carlos_mx',
        avatar: '🇲🇽',
        original: '¡Qué locura! La gente lo ama 😂',
        translated: "What madness! People love him 😂",
        lang: 'es',
        langLabel: 'Spanish',
        timestamp: '0:45',
    },
    {
        id: 5,
        username: 'seoul_watcher',
        avatar: '🇰🇷',
        original: '스피드 진짜 미쳤다 ㅋㅋㅋ',
        translated: 'Speed is really crazy lol',
        lang: 'ko',
        langLabel: 'Korean',
        timestamp: '0:46',
    },
    {
        id: 6,
        username: 'ahmed_eg',
        avatar: '🇪🇬',
        original: 'والله سبيد ده اسطورة 🐐',
        translated: 'Wallah Speed is a legend 🐐',
        lang: 'ar',
        langLabel: 'Arabic',
        timestamp: '0:47',
    },
    {
        id: 7,
        username: 'paris_live',
        avatar: '🇫🇷',
        original: "C'est incroyable le nombre de gens!",
        translated: "It's incredible how many people!",
        lang: 'fr',
        langLabel: 'French',
        timestamp: '0:48',
    },
    {
        id: 8,
        username: 'addis_ababa_fan',
        avatar: '🇪🇹',
        original: 'የአዲስ አበባ ልጆች ተነሱ! 💚💛❤️',
        translated: 'Addis Ababa kids stand up! 💚💛❤️',
        lang: 'am',
        langLabel: 'Amharic',
        timestamp: '0:49',
    },
    {
        id: 9,
        username: 'berlin_streamer',
        avatar: '🇩🇪',
        original: 'Das ist der wahnsinnigste Stream aller Zeiten',
        translated: 'This is the craziest stream of all time',
        lang: 'de',
        langLabel: 'German',
        timestamp: '0:50',
    },
    {
        id: 10,
        username: 'mumbai_fan',
        avatar: '🇮🇳',
        original: 'भाई ये तो पागल है 🤣🤣',
        translated: 'Bro this guy is crazy 🤣🤣',
        lang: 'hi',
        langLabel: 'Hindi',
        timestamp: '0:51',
    },
    {
        id: 11,
        username: 'speed_clips',
        avatar: '🎬',
        original: '10 MILLION views in 24 hours — this is HISTORY',
        translated: '10 MILLION views in 24 hours — this is HISTORY',
        lang: 'en',
        langLabel: 'English',
        timestamp: '0:52',
    },
    {
        id: 12,
        username: 'jakarta_gang',
        avatar: '🇮🇩',
        original: 'Gila sih ini orang wkwkwk',
        translated: 'This guy is insane lol',
        lang: 'id',
        langLabel: 'Indonesian',
        timestamp: '0:53',
    },
    {
        id: 13,
        username: 'habesha_queen',
        avatar: '🇪🇹',
        original: 'ኢትዮጵያ ለዘላለም! Speed ​​ እናመሰግናለን 🙏',
        translated: 'Ethiopia forever! Thank you Speed 🙏',
        lang: 'am',
        langLabel: 'Amharic',
        timestamp: '0:54',
    },
    {
        id: 14,
        username: 'moscow_viewer',
        avatar: '🇷🇺',
        original: 'Спид реально безумный стример 😂',
        translated: 'Speed is really an insane streamer 😂',
        lang: 'ru',
        langLabel: 'Russian',
        timestamp: '0:55',
    },
    {
        id: 15,
        username: 'tr_esports',
        avatar: '🇹🇷',
        original: 'Adam resmen çıldırmış JFKDLSJF',
        translated: 'The man has literally lost it JFKDLSJF',
        lang: 'tr',
        langLabel: 'Turkish',
        timestamp: '0:56',
    },
];

export default messages;
